patch:
--- a/alu_top.sv
+++ b/alu_top.sv
@@ -16,9 +16,9 @@ module alu_top (
   alu_32bit alu_inst (
     .operand_a(op_a),
     .operand_b(op_b),
-    .alu_result(result),
     .opcode(operation),
-    .alu_overflow(overflow)
+    .alu_result(result),
+    .overflow_flag(overflow)
   );
 
 endmodule
